page: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Faldsv7 server family. Powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features a single dedicated vCPU and 2.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, aligning it with compute-focused resource distributions.

The instance includes 118 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile lacks a graphics processing unit, with a GPU count of zero.

With only 1 vCPU and 2.0 GB of memory, the F1alds_v7 is constrained in its multi-threaded processing and memory-intensive capabilities. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent single-core execution without resource contention from other tenants, distinguishing it from shared-core burstable instances. This server is suited for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, basic web serving, small utility scripts, or development and testing environments that require dedicated CPU execution but have minimal memory footprints.
description: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is an entry-level, x86_64 architecture virtual machine from the Faldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a single dedicated AMD vCPU and 2.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance is equipped with 118 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU acceleration. Because of its dedicated CPU allocation, the server delivers consistent single-core performance without the CPU credit constraints typical of burstable instances. However, the 2.0 GB memory capacity limits its suitability for memory-intensive applications. The F1alds_v7 is designed for lightweight workloads, single-threaded utility tasks, basic web serving, and low-resource development or testing environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is a single-vCPU virtual machine with 2.0 GB of RAM and 118 GB of local storage, designed for lightweight dedicated compute workloads on AMD processors.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is a 1-vCPU virtual machine with 2.0 GB RAM and 118 GB local storage, built on AMD processors for lightweight workloads.
tagline: A single-core dedicated virtual machine with local storage, optimized for lightweight compute tasks and low-memory utility workloads.
bullet_points: Single dedicated AMD vCPU on x86_64 architecture
118 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Suited for lightweight single-threaded tasks and testing
